title: DarkTimer
description: Improve server performance, reduce server lag, clears dropped items every 10 minutes
body:
Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off!


 

DarkTimer


Clears dropped ground items to help reduce entity lag |  View Changelog

Server side is supported. You can install this on the server and not need to have it installed on the client.

Created by the same authors who made DarkRPG (for a full RPG experience, get the DarkRPG modpack and enjoy quests and rpg gameplay)

 

Features

(Your vanilla experience will be further enhanced thanks to these features) 

Modded servers can sometimes encounter an issue where dropped items do not despawn after 5 minutes. This results in unnecessary server lag due to entities. This simple mod aims to fix that by clearing dropped items every 10 minutes. This can be useful in a heavily modded environment where lots of players have dropped unwanted items on the ground that have not despawned and cause users to suffer entity lag. A warning message is displayed 10 minutes and 1 minute prior to clearing ground items. You can also change the duration of the timer using datapacks found at the GamerPotion support Discord  #files section.

 

Server performance with 31 players on the Official DarkRPG server:-

Permission - Feel free to use in your modpacks.
